scenario.key_phrase: I'm exploring, not ready to decide yet

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Namaskar! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Amit?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes this is Amit. But I'm quite busy right now...

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand Amit, I'll keep this brief. I'm calling regarding your interest in our JEE courses. Could you tell me which class you're currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Class 11... but I'm just exploring options, not really ready to decide anything yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul, no pressure at all! Exploration is important. Since you're in 11th, you have good time for JEE 2027. Are you specifically targeting JEE Main or Advanced?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Main mostly... but I don't know, there are so many coaching options. Why should I choose online over offline classes?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's a valid concern! Online gives you flexibility to study anytime, plus our JEE Lakshya 2027 batch has live classes with top faculty like Alakh Sir. You get same quality at much lower cost than traditional coaching. What's your current preparation level?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm average I guess... but honestly I need to discuss this with my parents first. They handle all these decisions.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely right! Parents should definitely be involved. Our JEE Lakshya is ₹35,999 or just ₹3,499 per month EMI - that's less than most offline coaching monthly fees. When would be a good time to call back and speak with your parents too?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm not sure about the timing... and ₹35,999 sounds like a lot. Are there any cheaper options?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan bilkul! We have JEE Arjuna 2027 at ₹19,999 - that's just ₹1,999 per month EMI. It has all essential features for JEE Main prep. Both courses have same quality teaching, Arjuna is more focused on JEE Main specifically.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm... I still need time to think. There are other platforms too like Unacademy, Vedantu. How is PW different?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! PW focuses on affordable quality education - same experienced faculty but at fraction of cost. Plus we have PW Pay with 0% EMI, no hidden charges. Our success rate for JEE is also very high. Should I call you back tomorrow evening to discuss with your parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe... but I'm still in exploration phase. Can you send me some details on WhatsApp instead? I'll discuss and then decide if we need a call.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sure Amit, I'll send complete course details on WhatsApp. Take your time to discuss with parents. Can I follow up with you next week to see if you have any questions after reviewing?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, next week should be fine. But no pressure please, I really need to compare all options first.
